title: Assign a Team depending on Person Assigned to
excerpt:
I have a board with a ‘Person’ and ‘Team’ columns. 
We create items in the board and people are assigned to them. Each person is part of one team within the Teams admin window in Monday. I would like for the Team column …

posts.author: lucialopez (Lucia Lopez)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have a board with a ‘Person’ and ‘Team’ columns.
We create items in the board and people are assigned to them. Each person is part of one team within the Teams admin window in Monday. I would like for the Team column to automatically fill with the correct Team based on the person it was assigned to

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Lucia!

Charlotte here from the monday team!

Would an automation recipe like the following one work for what you need?

Screen Shot 2024-01-02 at 3.18.14 PM1160×410 20.4 KB

Let me know what you think!
